summary: Data analyst with 5 years building SQL pipelines, experimentation frameworks, and self-serve analytics for fintech and payments products. Strong track record shipping dbt models and Statsig A/B tests that directly moved product KPIs, plus a habit of translating messy data into decisions finance and product leadership actually act on.

experience.title: Senior Data Analyst
bullets: Owned analytics for the SMB card product — built SQL + dbt pipelines tracking activation and spend adoption across 2,400 customers; surfaced cohort patterns that shifted Q3 roadmap priorities for 3 PMs.
Designed an A/B test framework in Statsig for the card onboarding flow, improving 30-day activation rate by 14% and cutting time-to-first-spend by 4 days.
Automated 6 weekly finance reports via Airflow + BigQuery, saving ~8 hours/week; built Looker dashboards used daily by the VP Finance and CFO.
Partnered with the ML team to operationalize a churn propensity model into a manual review queue, preventing ~$340K in write-offs over 2 quarters.
Audited 80+ production queries and reduced average BigQuery compute cost by 28% across the warehouse.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Owned background-check funnel analytics across 300K+ monthly completions; built anomaly detection that flagged SLA breaches before 94% of customer complaints.
Identified 3 workflow bottlenecks in the adjudication process, driving a 22% reduction in average report-to-close time.
Built self-serve Tableau dashboards for operations and customer success, eliminating 30+ hours/month of ad hoc data requests.
Instrumented 6 previously unmeasured product features via Segment in partnership with engineering; enabled first-party attribution for new product lines.
Ran quarterly business reviews for 2 enterprise accounts ($4M+ combined ARR), presenting cohort and retention analysis to VP-level stakeholders.

experience.title: Business Intelligence Intern
bullets: Built delivery SLA reporting dashboard in Tableau for ops leadership; queried and joined 3 MySQL data sources to surface order-level latency metrics.

projects.name: SQL Query Optimizer
projects.subtitle: Personal project · Python, BigQuery API
bullets: CLI tool that analyzes BigQuery query plans and recommends partitioning and clustering improvements; 340 GitHub stars, ~80 monthly active users.

projects.name: Stripe Payments Funnel Demo
projects.subtitle: Hackathon project · Python, Streamlit
bullets: Built a checkout funnel analytics dashboard modeling conversion drop-off by payment method and geography using Stripe's public test data.

education.degree: B.S. Cognitive Science, Data Science emphasis
details: GPA: 3.7 · Relevant coursework: Statistical Inference, Machine Learning, Database Systems, Experimental Design
